geography.data_source: MCGM ward boundaries (A, B, C, D, E wards mapped to numeric IDs); area from MCGM Development Plan 2034

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 Mumbai city district (A-E wards aggregated); density derived from population/area; household size from NSSO 76th Round upper-income Mumbai urban estimates; literacy from Census 2011 Mumbai city literacy tables; SC/ST share from Census 2011

income_profile.data_source: Income distribution right-skewed reflecting South Mumbai's premium real estate and corporate density; median from PLFS 2022-23 upper-quintile urban Mumbai adjusted for Nariman Point/Fort corporate salaries; informal rate from NSSO 78th Round for Mumbai city formal sector concentration; occupations from MCGM economic census and RBI/SEBI registered entity data

commute_profile.data_source: Mode share from MCTS 2016 for South Mumbai TAZs; car ownership from Census 2011 household assets adjusted upward for post-2011 growth in premium zones; commute distance/time from Google Maps typical estimates for intra-South Mumbai travel; metro Line 3 alignment from MMRDA

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Low fare sensitivity reflects high-income zone; high diffusion speed from high digital penetration; loss aversion low per behavioural economics lit for high-income populations; institutional trust from Lokniti-CSDS 2024 Mumbai upper-income sub-sample; political mobilisation from South Mumbai Assembly constituency voter engagement data 2024

social_network_parameters.data_source: Lower connection density reflects apartment-living social isolation in premium buildings; low clustering from professional-diverse workplace networks; high cross-income bridging from employer-domestic worker-service provider interactions; workplace dominant per South Mumbai's corporate character

informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Colaba Causeway is a major tourist and local shopping street; footfall estimated from tourism department data and MCGM pedestrian survey 2019; transit dependency lower due to walkability and taxi use
Fort area around Horniman Circle and DN Road; major wholesale and retail commercial district; footfall from BEST ridership data at Fort bus stops + CST station exit counts
Mahatma Jyotiba Phule Mandai (Crawford Market) — major wholesale fruit/vegetable and pet market; footfall from APMC and MCGM market license data
Fashion Street near Churchgate station; vendor count from MCGM hawker zone survey 2020
Informal service workers (tea stalls, document services, food carts) serving Nariman Point office district; footfall from working population estimates of Nariman Point CBD

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: High Income/Professional zone template from AGENT_SPEC.md; validated against PLFS 2022-23 occupation distribution for Mumbai city district upper-income wards

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Tier 2 counts estimated from South Mumbai corporate HQ density (BSE/NSE listed company registered offices), Mumbai Press Club membership for South Mumbai beat reporters, MCGM elected corporator count for A-E wards
